promptDescription: - **chord** — circular diagram showing directed flows or relationships between a set of categories arranged around a ring, where each arc is a category and each ribbon is the flow between two categories (ribbon thickness at each end encodes the value in that direction). Ideal for migration, navigation paths, message/traffic volume, or any square 'who-goes-to-whom' matrix. Provide `labels` (n names) and a square n×n `matrix` where matrix[i][j] is the flow FROM i TO j. Spec: { "type":"chord", "title":"...", "labels":["A","B","C"], "matrix":[[0,10,5],[10,0,8],[5,8,0]] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];var T={text:'#1a1a18',text2:'#5a5a56'};function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i'+a+' \u2192 '+b+': '+fmt(d.source.value)+'    '+b+' \u2192 '+a+': '+fmt(d.target.value);}).on('mouseleave',function(){d3.select(this).attr('fill-opacity',0.72);info.textContent='';});function highlight(idx){rib.attr('fill-opacity',function(d){return d.source.index===idx||d.target.index===idx?0.92:0.06;});}function reset(){rib.attr('fill-opacity',0.72);}var group=g.append('g').selectAll('g').data(chords.groups).enter().append('g');group.append('path').attr('d',arc).attr('fill',function(d){return colorFn(d.index);}).attr('stroke','#fff').attr('stroke-width',0.75).style('cursor','pointer').on('mouseenter',function(ev,d){highlight(d.index);var out=0,inc=0,k;for(k=0;k'+names[d.index]+'   out '+fmt(out)+'   in '+fmt(inc);}).on('mouseleave',function(){reset();info.textContent='';});group.append('text').each(function(d){d.angle=(d.startAngle+d.endAngle)/2;}).attr('dy','0.35em').attr('transform',function(d){return 'rotate('+(d.angle*180/Math.PI-90)+') translate('+(outer+8)+',0)'+(d.angle>Math.PI?' rotate(180)':'');}).attr('text-anchor',function(d){return d.angle>Math.PI?'end':null;}).attr('fill',T.text2).attr('font-size',11).text(function(d){return names[d.index];});if(spec.title){svg.append('text').attr('x',w/2).attr('y',18).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('fill',T.text).attr('font-size',13).attr('font-weight','500').text(spec.title);}}render();if(window.ResizeObserver){var ro=new ResizeObserver(function(){render();});ro.observe(wrap);}else{window.addEventListener('resize',render);}}if(window.d3)draw();else load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7/dist/d3.min.js','d3',draw);}
